data.description: ticket_delete walks every ticket directory and reads every LINK/UNLINK event file to find inbound links pointing at the deleted ticket. At ~16K tickets with M link events each, this is O(N*M) file I/O per delete. The reducer already maintains state.deps for each ticket via reduce_all_tickets. Using that path would convert inbound discovery from O(N*M) to O(N) state reads, consistent with how the rest of the codebase queries link state.
data.title: ticket-lib-api.sh: ticket_delete inbound-LINK scan is O(N*M) — should use reduce_all_tickets
